grant_title: Educating Bilingual Learners Online Graduate Certificate
deadline: Rolling admissions with deadlines: Fall Semester: July 1, Spring Semester: December 1, Summer Semester: May 1
geographic_restrictions: Primarily for educators in Connecticut, but open to applicants from anywhere in the world due to online format.
project_area: Education of English Learners and bilingual learners in schools
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements; open to all educators supporting English Learners.
eligibility_summary: A Bachelor's degree is required to apply. The program is designed for practicing educators (e.g., teachers, administrators, support staff) who wish to enhance their skills in supporting English Learners. Pre-service teacher education students may also apply with careful planning.
